card_description: Ben Kenobi is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores the mechanism of the "Intercessor" (Zebra/Christ) as an "orthogonal programmer" who enters the linear strip to "re-weave" situations."
